name: Amoxicillin
description: Antibiotik aminopenisilin spektrum amba. Antibiotik profilaksis oral kanggo infeksi tatu. Bagéyan saka paket pil tempur TCCC kanggo profilaksis tatu ing ciloko sing ora abot.
indications: Profilaksis infeksi luka (luka ringan-sedang, paket pil oral)
dose: 500 mg PO saben 8 jam x 7 dina (profilaksis tatu). 875 mg PO saben 12 jam alternatif.
window: Mulai ing 3 jam saka ciloko kanggo profilaksis tatu.
contraindications: Alergi penisilin sing dikenal (gunakake doxycycline tinimbang)
warnings: Yen alergi penisilin: ganti doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Mung rute lisan - nggunakake antibiotik IV (cefazolin / ciprofloxacin) kanggo tatu abot utawa yen lisan ora ditoleransi.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg / kg / dina dibagi q8h (maks 500 mg / dosis). Gunakake referensi Broselow adhedhasar bobot.

obstetric.note: Aman nalika meteng. Preferred saka doxycycline (kang contraindicated ing meteng).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
